name: nominal_ordered_channel_ban
rationale: Nominal data has no inherent order; ordered channels (luminance, size) imply false ranking.

name: quantitative_shape_ban
rationale: Shape has no magnitude interpretation; cannot represent quantitative differences.

name: nominal_line_mark_ban
rationale: Line marks imply continuity and ordering that does not exist in nominal data. Use bar or point marks instead.

name: 3d_static_ban
rationale: 3D visualizations in static 2D media cause systematic occlusion and foreshortening errors. Increases perceived complexity by +1.212 weight.
source: Borgo et al. 2012 'Eye of the Beholder'; Munzner 2014

name: contrast_ratio_minimum
rationale: Users with low vision require distinct boundaries; 3:1 is the ISO standard minimum for graphical objects.

name: rainbow_jet_ban
rationale: Non-monotonic luminance creates false boundaries (Mach bands) and confusing artifacts, misleading users.

name: red_green_distinction_ban
rationale: Red-Green color blindness (Deuteranopia/Protanopia) makes pure red and green appear identical. Use Vermilion (#D55E00) and Bluish-Green (#009E73).

name: color_only_encoding_ban
rationale: Relying solely on hue makes data indistinguishable for CVD users. Must use redundant encoding (shape, pattern, label).

name: categorical_cardinality_limit
rationale: Visual search degrades rapidly beyond 12 colors; human short-term memory cannot reliably map legend items.

name: diverging_scale_requires_midpoint
rationale: Diverging scales perceptually imply a critical midpoint (e.g., zero). Applying them to data without such a center misleads users about magnitude progression.

name: zoom_scale_constraints
rationale: Unconstrained zoom allows users to pan into empty space or zoom beyond data resolution, causing disorientation.

name: brush_reset_behavior
rationale: Empty brush state must restore all views to 100% opacity, preventing users from getting stuck in empty filter state.

name: minimum_mark_size
rationale: Marks smaller than ~2px become invisible on standard displays, causing data to disappear.

name: dynamic_domain_calculation
rationale: Hardcoded domains fail when data changes. Always use d3.extent() or equivalent dynamic domain calculation.

name: empty_data_handling
rationale: Empty datasets should show explicit 'No Data' feedback rather than a blank canvas.

name: semantic_color_conflict_ban
rationale: Mismatched semantic colors (e.g., 'Strawberry'→Blue) trigger Stroop interference, significantly increasing cognitive load.
